description: Demand pattern with reduced correlation: first peak at 60% (not 100%), second peak occurs BEFORE carbon peak. 40 points matching carbon_scenario.json exactly.

explanation.points_0_7: Morning good carbon (40-80 gCO2): Demand rises slowly 30%→60%
explanation.points_8_12: Carbon degrading (120-280): Demand rises then falls 65%→75%→65%, NOT following carbon
explanation.points_15_24: Carbon falling (290-60): Demand continues gradual decline 58%→38%
explanation.points_25_28: Stable low carbon (50-55): Demand at minimum 35-38%
explanation.points_29_39: Carbon rising again (60-300): Demand rises 42%→100% but peaks at point 37, BEFORE carbon peaks at 39 (100%→85%→75%)
